mapper.select: select count(*) from item where item_usage = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, I.* FROM ( SELECT item_id AS itemId, item_name AS itemName, item_type AS itemType, item_unit AS unit, item_spec AS spec, item_unit_price AS unitPrice, item_storage AS itemStorage, item_vendor AS itemVendor, item_usedate AS useDate, item_safety_stock AS safetyStock, item_usage AS itemUsage FROM item WHERE item_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY item_id DESC ) I ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
